        <td class="code highlight">
          <pre class="yaml"><span class="hljs-attr">lockfileVersion:</span> <span class="hljs-string">'9.0'</span>

<span class="hljs-attr">settings:</span>
  <span class="hljs-attr">autoInstallPeers:</span> <span class="hljs-literal">true</span>
  <span class="hljs-attr">excludeLinksFromLockfile:</span> <span class="hljs-literal">false</span>

<span class="hljs-attr">importers:</span>
